special_mechanics.name: Run/Sprint
special_mechanics.description: L or R button depending on character facing direction makes Joe or Mac run

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Players use various weapons including boomerangs, bones, fire, flints, electricity, stone wheels, and clubs. Some weapons can be charged up in arcade/Genesis versions but not in SNES version

special_mechanics.name: Health Degradation
special_mechanics.description: Health system where player loses health over time except during boss battles

special_mechanics.name: Two-Player Collision
special_mechanics.description: In some versions both characters are capable of damaging each other

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative) - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Movement data not detailed in TCRF or Wikipedia articles. Gameplay focused on level design, weapons, and story rather than physics documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Joe & Mac (SNES)
